calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2022 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Oct-25-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2022 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-17-2022 Text Ruling

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar May-13-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS' FRANKLIN FUNES MARVILLA AND URBAN REMEDY, INC'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE CROSS-COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

FRANKLIN FUNES MARVILLA and URBAN REMEDY, INC.'s ("Marvilla") motion to file a cross-complaint is denied. Marvilla seeks to file a permissive cross-complaint against non-party Dov Kaufman. Since the proposed cross-complaint is permissive, the "good faith" standard of CCP 426.50 does not apply and Silver Organizations Ltd. v. Frank (1990) 217 Cal.App.3d 94 is inapposite. The "interest of justice" standard of CCP 428.50 controls. The court concludes that it is not in the interest of justice to allow the cross-complaint given the current trial date of June 13, 2022, and the unexplained delay in filing the instant motion. Allowing the amendment will delay the trial and prejudice plaintiff. Marvilla can seek to litigate their negligence/indemnity claims against Kaufman in a separate action.

Order signed.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/SRB)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2021 Set For Trial On Jun-13-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
